# AlarmSmoke

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::AlarmSmoke;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        AlarmSmoke { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
fire, alert, warning, detector, carbon monoxide, safety, equipment, amenities

## Categories
home, devices, travel

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/alarm-smoke)
